query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS chat_attachments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  messageId INT NOT NULL,
  chatId INT NOT NULL,
  uploaderId INT NOT NULL,
  fileName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  fileType VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  fileSize INT NOT NULL,
  mimeType VARCHAR(100),
  storageKey VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  storageUrl TEXT NOT NULL,
  thumbnailUrl TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_presence (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  status ENUM('online', 'away', 'busy', 'offline') DEFAULT 'offline' NOT NULL,
  statusMessage VARCHAR(255),
  lastActiveAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  lastSeenAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  currentActivity ENUM('none', 'in_meeting', 'presenting', 'typing') DEFAULT 'none',
  currentMeetingId INT,
  currentChatId INT,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS meeting_chats (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  meetingId INT NOT NULL,
  chatId INT NOT NULL,
  persistAfterMeeting BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS video_provider_configs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  provider ENUM('daily', 'teams', 'zoom', 'custom') NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  isEnabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  isDefault BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  apiKey TEXT,
  apiSecret TEXT,
  webhookSecret TEXT,
  accessToken TEXT,
  refreshToken TEXT,
  tokenExpiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  settings JSON,
  tenantId VARCHAR(255),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
